name: Reinforced Flashlight
description: Standard-issue illumination. Available from day one.

name: Level 1 Keycard
description: Opens low-clearance containment doors.

name: Tactical Kevlar Vest
description: Reduces ballistic damage from hostile factions.

name: Epsilon-11 Rifle
description: MTF standard rifle effective against rogue operatives.

name: Scranton Reality Anchor
description: Stabilises local reality; suppresses reality-bending anomalies.

name: Micro-H.I.D. Emitter
description: High-intensity discharge weapon; lethal to durable Keter-class entities.

name: Hazmat Containment Suit
description: Protects against corrosive secretions and airborne hazards.

name: Thermal/IR Optics
description: Reveals SCP-966 and other invisible thermal-signature entities.

name: Femur-Bone Recall Lure
description: Recall device used to re-contain SCP-106.

name: Memetic Analysis Kit
description: Lab kit for studying cognitohazards safely.

name: Anomalous Signature Scanner
description: Detects Hume fluctuations and classifies anomalies.

name: Kant Counter
description: Measures local reality strength (Humes) for breach prediction.

name: Memetic Inoculant Serum
description: Grants temporary resistance to memetic/cognitohazardous effects.

name: Cryogenic Containment Unit
description: Sub-zero habitat module required to contain SCP-939.

name: Faraday Isolation Rig
description: Electromagnetically isolates digital anomalies (SCP-079/1471).

name: Ballistic Riot Shield
description: Portable shield wall; blocks melee lunges and thrown debris.

name: Sedative Dart Rifle
description: Non-lethal tranquiliser rounds for subduing hostile humanoid anomalies.

name: Rapid Biohazard Foam
description: Expanding foam that seals contamination and slows corrosive or organic threats.

name: EMP Charge Kit
description: Disables electronic and digital-based anomalies on detonation.

name: Antimemetic Suppressant
description: Temporary resistance serum against antimemetic and amnestic-triggering effects.
